title: Sword & Knife
description: A 2D Web Action Game built entirely from scratch

title: Pixel Hero Survival
description: Fast-paced 2D survival roguelike focused on responsive combat and real-time gameplay feedback

title: Magic Academy
description: A fantasy academy web application developed from scratch with vanilla frontend technologies. The project showcases frontend fundamentals and will be expanded with a Python backend for dynamic content management.
keyFeatures: Future Python backend and database integration
